title: alcea chrysantha
intro: Alcea chrysantha, commonly known as the yellow hollyhock, is a perennial plant species in the mallow family, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and tall stature. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Alcea chrysantha include its ability to soothe digestive problems, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. Alcea chrysantha is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
